Request for Proposal
Public procurement tender for managed support services.

Scope of work
The bidder shall provide onboarding, operational monitoring, and monthly service reports.

Submission deadline
Proposal submission deadline is 15 September 2026 at 17:00.
Late bids will not be accepted.

Bid requirements
Include technical proposal, staffing plan, compliance declaration, and pricing model.
The tender committee will evaluate feasibility, delivery risks, and mandatory documentation.
